name: the gate accepts a copyleft tool that is correctly flagged invoke_only (installed separately, not bundled)
command: mkdir -p vendor/canonical-vocabulary rubric/runners && printf '%s' '{"mirrors":{}}' > vendor/canonical-vocabulary/provenance.json && printf '%s' '{"tools":[{"tool":"semgrep","license":"LGPL-2.1","invoke_only":true}]}' > rubric/runners/toolchain.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo invoke-only-accepted 1>&2
